Key differentiators: natural language workflow builder, SOC2 Type II certified, 99.99% uptime SLA, deploys in days not months. Tone: ultra-modern, dark tech aesthetic, electric blue and cyan accents, sharp typography. Include animated background elements, glassmorphism cards, and a strong conversion focus. Show social proof from companies like Ramp, Mercury, Datadog, and Plaid.

sections.label: Features
sections.html:
Why teams choose us

Build resilient operations with AI-native workflow automation

Velox gives engineering and ops teams enterprise-grade control, rapid deployment, and measurable reliability from day one.

Natural Language Workflow Builder

Describe your process in plain English and Velox generates production-ready workflows with conditions, approvals, and retries. Teams move from idea to live automation in hours—not sprint cycles.

Explore →
Prompt to flow Version history Live debugging

200+ Integrations

Connect Slack, Jira, Salesforce, HubSpot, and internal tools through one orchestration layer. No brittle scripts or integration sprawl.

Explore →

SOC2 Type II Security

Enterprise-grade controls, encrypted data paths, and auditable policy workflows keep compliance effortless for scaling teams.

Explore →

99.99% Uptime SLA

Mission-critical reliability with real-time failover, queue protection, and observability dashboards built for production confidence.

Explore →

Full-funnel Visibility

Track every workflow step with latency, success rates, and ownership insights. Identify blockers before they impact customers or revenue.

Explore →

Deploy in Days, Not Months

Prebuilt templates and guided onboarding get teams live fast. Most Series A–C customers launch their first critical workflow in under a week.

Explore →

Trusted by high-velocity teams at

Ramp Mercury Datadog Plaid Slack Jira Salesforce HubSpot
Ramp Mercury Datadog Plaid Slack Jira Salesforce HubSpot

sections.label: Testimonials
sections.html:
Customer Stories

Trusted by teams shipping mission-critical workflows

See how engineering and ops leaders at Series A–C companies use Velox to automate execution without adding headcount.

4.9/5

from 1,284 verified reviews

G2 Leader Capterra Top Rated Trustpilot Excellent

“

Velox replaced six brittle Zapier chains and gave our platform team a single control plane for operations. We cut incident triage automation from 2 weeks to 3 days, and onboarding new engineers to internal workflows dropped by 60%. The natural language builder let PMs spec workflows directly, so engineering time went to product, not glue code.

AK

Avery Kim

Head of Platform Engineering, Ramp • 320 employees

Metric highlight

📈 3x faster deployment

Production rollout of new workflows now happens in days, not months.

Ramp Engineering

“

We connected Slack approvals to Salesforce updates and Jira issue states in a single afternoon. Velox reduced manual handoffs across RevOps and engineering by 47% in the first month. The uptime SLA and SOC2 posture made procurement surprisingly painless.

NR

Nina Rao

CTO, Mercury • 180 employees

“

Our security and compliance teams needed auditable automation without slowing release velocity. Velox gave us policy-aware workflows and clean logs we can hand directly to auditors. Deployment automation is now 68% faster across three product squads.

JT

Jordan Tate

VP Engineering, Datadog • 450 employees

“

Before Velox, every cross-functional process lived in someone’s head. Now our ops playbooks are executable workflows tied into HubSpot, Jira, and Slack. We launched a new customer onboarding motion in 9 days and improved activation rates by 22% quarter-over-quarter.

ML

Maya Lin

Director of Operations, Plaid • 260 employees

Join 2,300+ high-growth teams automating mission-critical workflows with Velox.

sections.label: Faq
sections.html:
FAQs

Everything you need to know

Answers to the most common questions about Velox’s AI workflow automation, security, onboarding, and more. Contact support

How does Velox pricing work for growing teams?
Velox offers three plans: Starter ($49/mo, up to 50 users), Growth ($149/mo, up to 250 users), and Enterprise (custom pricing, unlimited users). Switch or upgrade any time—no hidden fees.
Is Velox SOC2 Type II certified and enterprise compliant?
Yes, Velox is SOC2 Type II certified and fully GDPR compliant. Our platform is trusted by leading companies like Ramp, Mercury, Datadog, and Plaid for robust security and privacy.
How long does onboarding and deployment take?
Most teams are live in under 5 days. Our onboarding specialists guide you through every step, and our natural language builder means no code or complex setup required.
What support options are available?
All plans include 24/7 chat and email support. Growth and Enterprise tiers receive a dedicated success manager and priority SLAs. Our average response time is under 30 minutes.
Which integrations does Velox support out of the box?
Velox connects natively with Slack, Jira, Salesforce, HubSpot, and 200+ other tools via secure OAuth. Custom API and webhook integrations are available for Enterprise customers.
How does Velox handle data privacy and security?
All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We never share your information with third parties. Role-based access controls, audit logs, and granular permissions keep your workflows secure.
Can we cancel or change our plan at any time?
Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time directly from your dashboard. There are no lock-in contracts and no cancellation fees.
Does Velox support large teams or multi-department orgs?
Yes, Velox is built for scale—supporting unlimited teams, departments, and users on our Enterprise plan. Role-based permissions and SSO ensure secure collaboration across your organization.
Still have questions?

Our team is here
